page_metadata.biotools__summary: Microarray normalization method to facilitate personalized-medicine workflows that can be applied to one or two channels microarrays. It normalizes each sample individually by modeling and removing probe -and array- specific background noise using only data from within each array.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Microarray normalization method to facilitate personalized-medicine workflows that can be applied to one or two channels microarrays. It normalizes each sample individually by modeling and removing probe -and array- specific background noise using only data from within each array.
